reviewSummary: Local outpost of a Taiwanese shop specializing in brown sugar boba prepared in an open kitchen. [object Object] Andre Alyass, 4/5, 5 months ago: Really good! If you are in flushing try this place out. The shop really stands out and the brown sugar tapioca so really delicious. They also have good hot matcha. I think the milk is not so refreshing compared to another place but overall, great quality boba and really delicious tapioca. Jason S, 5/5, 4 months ago: I had the Thai tea boba and the boba pearls man it was amazingly good. It’s made fresh by the window. I highly recommend this place if you’re a boba lover🧋 10/10…! Bonnie Ye, 4/5, 6 months ago: I visited this place three days in a row!

reviewSummary: multifaceted wanderer, 5/5, 6 months ago: Great local gem. Heard about them on social media, and the story behind the establishment is beautiful. A very diverse menu for caffeine lovers / kids / fruit or milk tea enthusiasts. Greeted upon entry by the young lovely owner of the boba establishment- she was super friendly and patient. Came here late night and there was still a line for boba (a good sign)! I prefer to support small boba chains when I can, especially if they’re as delicious and fresh as the one at great east! Will most definitely be returning. mj, 5/5, a month ago: i tried on too good to go, wow! very tasty. not 100% sure what i got but i think it was some form of tea and pearls,

reviewSummary: [object Object] Jiaojiao Zhong, 5/5, a month ago: I had such a great experience at this tea shop! The drinks are consistently delicious, fresh, and perfectly balanced, not overly sweet like many other places. The atmosphere is clean, cozy, and welcoming, making it a great spot to relax or catch up with friends. I especially want to give a shoutout to one of the staff members Asen who helped me during my visit. They were incredibly friendly, patient, and attentive, taking the time to answer my questions and recommend drinks based on my preferences. Their positive attitude really made my day and elevated the whole experience. It’s rare to find both high-quality drinks and such genuine customer
